body_txt: Sex makes babies , and people who have a lot of sex, unless they use protection or are sterile, will likely end up having a lot of children. Sometimes this is a result of carelessness, while other times the character goes out of their way to have numerous children. Sometimes characters with this attitude are deadbeats who actively avoid taking care of their children, other times they have enough decency to take responsibility, and still others play favourites by taking care of some children and abandoning others. Regardless, their relationship with their kids, if any, is likely to be complicated. Reasons why a character might have so many kids can vary; a money-hungry person who wants child support and/or government support might have several children to maximize the benefits. A person who wants to use their children for some sinister purpose might decide to sleep with multiple people for the purpose of having as many children as possible. If the work takes place before reliable contraceptives became widely available, then this might be the logical result of someone who sleeps around all the time; by contrast, works that take place afterwards might have characters having so many kids because they're too stupid and/or careless to use them. As one would expect, this trope is almost Always Male . Could be a consequence of someone who Really Gets Around or is a Serial Adulterer . Particularly evil variants of this character might be Serial Rapists whose children are the product of rape . Could be a reason for Massive Numbered Siblings . Overlaps with Immortality Promiscuity if an immortal being, such as a deity, has a lot of kids out of wedlock, which isn't uncommon in some mythologies. Said children could potentially be the Son of a Whore if the parent is a sex worker. Note: This trope only includes characters who have several children as a result of sleeping around; polyamorous characters who have several children by their lovers don't count unless they also have multiple children outside their relationship. Because this is both a Sex Trope and too common, No Real Life Examples, Please! .
